title: Mystiques of the Wilds (Formerly Hybrids Plus)
description: Mystiques of the Wilds is a mod that adds a bunch of custom dragons and hybrids to the Isle of Berk mod and Archipelago Additions!
body:
Hybrids Plus adds a bunch of different Dragons to Isle of Berk and Archipelago Additions. It requires Archipelago Additions and its requirements to work. To Report any bugs, join the New Berk Dawn's Discord and find our Addon channel! Thank you. There is also a lite version in the addon channel for those who do not want the mod added stuff as they are made with Mcreator.

Dragons and Hybrids the mod currently adds

- SeethingHowls
  "Packs of these predators roam the snowy taigas and plains. They are covered in thick fur, similar to woolly howls, though unlike them, Seethinghowls have large wolflike ears, and they howl at night like dogs. They are also strangely immune to alpha calls."
- DivineStepper
  "A strange species often seen flying above large mountain ranges. Unlike other species of dragons, they are covered in feathers that protect their wings. Myths talk of the feathers having healing properties."
- StalkingBloom
  “A dragon species found in places full of plant species- They seem to have a symbiotic relationship with these flowers; they allow them to undergo photosynthesis; however, they still have to eat at least once in a few months.”
- Voidwalker
  “A strange Dragon found in the depths of the End. They seem to teleport in and out of an unknown space. The first theory was that they go invisible, similar to the Lightfury however, once they vanish, they vanish. Vikings have put them in places they should NEVER be able to leave, yet they do-”
- ShatteredSpark
  "Unholy combination of The King and Lightning made by the hands of man. This large dragon has the ability to control other dragons and shoot balls of ice that look to have lightning frozen in it."
- ShadowSnatcher
  "A strange silverphantom-like dragon, when first born, their future skeletal armor is more of a cartilage that slowly hardens as they grow older."
- Waverender
  "The long-lost connection between Nightfuries and Sandwraiths. They are quite rare to find, but they can be found around oceans. Their blasts are not the normal plasma of fury species; instead, it's molten glass. They fish in the waters and blend in to more easily catch their prey."
- GaleChaser
"A hybrid between the Nightfury and the Stormcutter. These dragons blend perfectly into the sky and glide gracefully across them. They soar the skies with precision, stalking the ground for their next meal."

It also adds a villager profession called the Stange Dragon Trader that trades egg crates of all the dragon types and will buy scales, fur, and feathers off you. 
A villager profession block called the Hatchery Stall.
a New currency type called Ancient tokens, you can make via emeralds or runes.
adds 3 new structures: Arcadia's Camp, Destroyed Tower, and Voidwalker nest.
adds 8 new potions that have 2 vanilla potion effects you make via the scales, fur and feathers of your dragons.
And finally adds a new tool/weapon called Arcadia's axe you find in the Arcadia's camp structure
